recipe.title: Mon Apr 20 — Shrimp & Grits
ingredients: Kosher salt and black pepper, to taste
2¼ lb jumbo shrimp, peeled and deveined
1½ red bell peppers, seeded and chopped
steps: In a large saucepan, bring 4½ cups stock to a boil. Slowly stir in grits, return to boil, cook 3–4 min. Turn down heat, stir in pepper jack, cheddar, and mascarpone. Cook 3–4 min until cheese is melted. Stir in 3 tbsp butter, season with salt and pepper. Keep warm.
In a separate saucepan, heat remaining 3 cups stock until hot.
In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat oil and remaining 3 tbsp butter. Season shrimp with Cajun seasoning. Cook until pink, ~2 min per side. Transfer to plate.

In the same skillet, cook bacon until crispy. Add onion, bell peppers, and jalapeño. Cook until softened, 4–5 min. Stir in tomato paste and ¾ cup warm stock. Simmer 2–3 min. Add shrimp back in, squeeze lemon juice over top.
Divide grits among shallow bowls. Spoon shrimp and sauce over top. Garnish with green onions.
